name: splex-landing
description: Marketing landing page for Splex, served by the backend at the site root.

comments.overrides: @tailwindcss/vite lists vite as a peer (… || ^7 || ^8), so npm would pull vite 8 next to Astro 6's vite 7 and the two copies break the Tailwind plugin's resolver. Pin a single vite 7 that both support.
